Services

Service list variants

Icon Grid

Service One

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Tile Roof Restoration

Professional tile roof restoration — deep clean, repoint, reseal, and recoat. Restores waterproofing, lifts curb appeal, adds years to your roof's life.

Service Two

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Metal Roof Restoration

Colorbond and metal roof restoration — rust treatment, repainting, resealing. Restore your metal roof's appearance and weatherproofing.

Service Three

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Roof Repairs & Maintenance

Emergency roof repairs, leak detection, tile replacement, gutter repairs. Fast response across Melbourne.

Gutter Services

Gutter replacement, gutter guard installation, and thorough gutter cleaning to protect your home from water damage.

Proof

Trust and FAQ variants

Testimonials grid

Testimonials stacked

Logo strip

Local partnerIndustry bodyCommunity groupSupplier

FAQ list

What is the difference between a roof restoration and a roof replacement?

A roof restoration involves cleaning, repairing, and recoating your existing roof structure, extending its life without removing the existing roof covering. A roof replacement strips the old roof entirely and installs new roofing material. Restoration is typically 40-60% cheaper and takes 2-4 days instead of 1-2 weeks.

How much does a roof restoration cost in Melbourne?

As a rough guide: a standard 3-bedroom home (200sqm) tile roof restoration ranges from $4,000 to $8,000. Metal roof restoration ranges from $3,000 to $6,000. We provide free, no-obligation quotes with a detailed breakdown.

How long does a typical roof restoration last?

A professionally done roof restoration should last 10-15+ years with proper maintenance. We use premium-grade coatings and back our work with a 10-year workmanship guarantee.

Is roof restoration worth it?

Absolutely. A roof restoration costs a fraction of a full replacement, adds 10-15 years to your roof's life, improves energy efficiency, increases property value, and enhances curb appeal. For most Melbourne homes with aging but structurally sound roofs, it is the smartest investment you can make.

What are the signs my roof needs restoration?

Look for faded or patchy colour, moss or lichen growth, cracked or slipped tiles, rust spots on metal roofs, peeling paint, light visible through gaps, and rising energy bills. If unsure, we offer a free inspection and assessment.

Can you restore a Colorbond or metal roof?

Yes. Metal roof restoration involves rust treatment, repointing fasteners, and repainting with UV-stable roof paint matched to your existing Colorbond colour.

Do you provide free quotes?

Always. Free on-site inspections and detailed written quotes with no obligation. If you decide to proceed, great. If not, no pressure.

What areas of Melbourne do you serve?

We cover the entire Melbourne metro area including Thomastown, Epping, Mill Park, South Morang, Moonee Ponds, Essendon, Greensborough, Coburg, Reservoir, Preston, Box Hill, and all surrounding suburbs.

Media

Gallery variants

Portfolio

Grid

Feature left

Feature right

CTAs

CTA variants

Band call to action

Use for major conversion moments between sections or near the end of a page.

Contact

Split call to action

Use when the CTA needs stronger separation without changing page hierarchy.

Contact

Inline call to action

Use inside quieter pages where a full band would feel too heavy.

Contact

Trust

Trust bar

Why choose Jefferson's?

20+ Years Experience
Licensed & Insured
Premium Materials
5-Star Rated
Get a Quote

Media + text

Two-column media

Image + body copy, flippable. Use on service pages, about pages, or anywhere you need to show and tell. Distinct from Hero split-media (hero-scale) and Introduction (editorial, no image).

Media on right (default)

Heading on the text side

Brief body copy explaining what's shown in the image and why it matters. Two or three sentences is plenty.

Optional CTA

Media on left

Heading on the text side

Flip the media to the left for alternating rhythm on longer pages. The content side stays visually anchored.

Stats

Stats bar

Big numbers, small labels. Use on any theme for credibility and trust. Combine with a Section header block or use standalone.

By the numbers

Stats with section header

20+ Years experience
500+ Projects delivered
98% Client satisfaction
15 Team members

Standalone on dark

4.9 Google rating
24h Response time
100% On-time delivery

Combos

Section rhythm — a mini page

How components flow together. Default → surface → dark → default creates visual rhythm. See SECTION_RECIPES.md for the full page composition guide.

Pattern

Service introduction

Default theme with a two-column media block showing the primary service.

What we deliver

Describe the core offering. This pattern works well at the top of service detail pages or as a homepage deep-dive after the intro.

Proof

Why clients choose us

20+ Years experience
500+ Projects
98% Satisfaction

Testimonials

What clients say

Dark theme breaks the rhythm — signals a distinct zone. Use once or twice per page.

"Working with this team was the best decision we made. The quality is outstanding and the process was seamless from start to finish."

— Client Name, Suburb

Ready to start your project?

This CTA band closes the rhythm — conversion moment after the proof section.

Contact us

Themes

Brand theme variants

Use theme on <Section> or data-theme on any element to shift the colour treatment. Buttons, text, borders, and headings inherit automatically.

Default theme

Standard page sections

White background, dark text. This is the base theme — use it for most content.

Surface theme

Alternating content bands

Warm off-white background. Use to create visual rhythm between default sections without introducing a colour change.

Dark theme

Structural contrast zones

Near-black background, white text. Built into the footer, trust bar, and image-full hero. Use for zones that should feel distinct from the main content flow.

Solid light button Outline light button

Primary theme

High-impact brand panels

Brand primary background with contrasting text. Use once per page maximum for the most important call to action or feature panel.

Theme button Secondary button

Smart Choice Roof Restorations

Melbourne's trusted roof restoration specialists. Tile, metal, and gutter services backed by 15+ years experience and a 10-year workmanship guarantee.
